one_time_description: Government of Canada promissory notes for treaty negotiations totalling $8,323,360 were forgiven effective March 31, 2020
economic_notes: Nation holds 49.5% interest in Pacheedaht Andersen Timber Holdings LP and Qala:yit Forestry LP. Operates gas station, campground, commercial fishery, and San Juan Market. COVID-19 declared pandemic March 11, 2020 with potential material impact noted as subsequent event.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED because financial records for Pacheedaht Forestry Limited and Pacheedaht Fisheries Company Inc. were unavailable; auditors could not verify carrying value of investments or share of income/loss from these enterprises. Treaty negotiation promissory notes of $8,323,360 to Government of Canada were forgiven effective March 31, 2020 — this is a significant one-time item that dramatically reduced long-term debt from $11.76M to $3.35M. 11 entities accounted for under modified equity method (GBEs). No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. total_government_transfers includes ISC $2,333,511 + Govt of Canada $1,143,524 + Dept of Fisheries & Oceans $951,013 + Province of BC $957,665 + First Nations Health Authority $702,140 + FNESC $112,056 + Coast Salish Employment & Training Society $83,079 + BC Hydro $57,466 = $6,340,454 less items that may be non-government; osr calculated accordingly. COVID-19 pandemic noted as subsequent event.
